title: CLAUDE.md Architecture line 44-46 still references claude/skills/openclaw as harnesses
description: Repo-root CLAUDE.md's Repository Architecture section (lines 44-46) still says 'codex, gemini, claude, skills, openclaw, and SPM harnesses, including merged harness-backed homes such as Claude'. Stale on multiple counts: claude is no longer a harness (it's a persona inside hulk per the founding-breach split + this session's home graduation); skills isn't a harness; openclaw isn't a harness either. Actual harnesses now: apple-pi, clide, codex, digikoma, gemini, hermes-harness, hulk, pi. Surface this fix as a small focused commit; touched briefly during the claude home graduation but not corrected.
